title: ollama/ollama
summary: Get up and running with Llama 3.3, DeepSeek-R1, Phi-4, Gemma 2, and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client for Ollama, letting you run large language models locally with a few lines of code.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Ollama, usable in Node.js or browsers.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration for Ollama models, enabling retrieval-augmented generation and agent workflows.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Open-source ChatGPT-style web UI for Ollama, featuring themes, code highlighting, and multi-model chats.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama with fluent API, streaming, and embedding support.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Official Ruby gem for Ollama, wrapping the REST API with idiomatic Ruby.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration to use Ollama models as generators or embedders in Haystack pipelines.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that brings local AI code completion via Ollama models.

title: ollama-docker
summary: Official Docker images and docker-compose stacks for running Ollama and its web UI.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Helm chart for deploying Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU node selection and autoscaling.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: Community-maintained C#/.NET client for Ollama with async streaming and strong typing.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Rust-based CLI that wraps the Ollama REST API with fzf model picker and conversation history.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal RAG template using Ollama embeddings + Chroma vector DB + Streamlit frontend.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Discord bot that lets users chat with local Ollama models using slash commands.

title: ollama-slack
summary: Slack Bolt app that integrates Ollama models into channels with @bot mentions.

title: ollama-nix
summary: Nix flake for reproducible Ollama builds and development shells with CUDA support.

title: ollama-distroless
summary: Distroless container images for Ollama reducing attack surface and image size.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Async Rust crate for Ollama with Tokio, featuring chat, embeddings, and model management.

title: ollama-go
summary: Idiomatic Go client for Ollama with context cancellation and structured logging.
